CHIANTELLI. APPEARANCE: CHRIS ANDREAS, ESQ. OF BRAYTON-PURCELL, 415/898-1555 ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF(S). NO APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF WESTERN MACARTHUR. MATTER WAS SUBMITTED ON THE PAPERS. REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF JOHN LEADERICH AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO. IN THE SUM OF $175,600.00 AND JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF ODA LEADERICH AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WESTERN MACARTHUR CO.
